// ⚠️ DO NOT EDIT - Auto-generated file // This file listens for Hugo paginator events and navigates the live page. // Source: node_modules/hugo-paginator/index.js // // Since this relies on node_modules, you can install with: // npm install hugo-paginator (function() { 'use strict'; const paginator = document.querySelector('.pagination'); if (paginator) { const links = paginator.querySelectorAll('a'); links.forEach(function(link) { link.addEventListener('click', function(e) { // allow normal navigation }); }); } })();
